settings.heading: Return eligibility
settings.text: Returns must be approved before being sent back. Items should be unused, complete and in their original condition with all included parts and packaging where possible.

settings.heading: Return shipping cost
settings.text: Customers are responsible for return shipping costs unless the item is faulty, damaged in transit or incorrect.

settings.heading: Faulty or incorrect items
settings.text: If your order arrives faulty, damaged or incorrect, contact us with your order number and photos so we can help resolve it.

settings.heading: Consumer rights
settings.text: This policy does not limit any rights you may have under applicable consumer law.

settings.heading: Returns without confusion.
settings.intro: If something is not right, contact us first so we can confirm the next step.
